creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: I ended up committing a slightly modified form of the patch. The sysctl (correctly) uses OID_AUTO, so there's no need to #define an oid for it in icmp_var.h. And since it doesn't use a reserved OID, it's not correct to document it in sysctl.3 - icmp.4 is where all the ICMP sysctls are documented.
